mapper.insert: INSERT INTO daily_checkin (user_id, checkin_date, checkin_time, continuous_days, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{checkinDate}, #{checkinTime}, #{continuousDays}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM daily_checkin WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND checkin_date = #{checkinDate}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM daily_checkin WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM daily_checkin WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND checkin_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}
SELECT * FROM daily_checkin WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY checkin_date DESC
SELECT * FROM daily_checkin WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY checkin_date DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT * FROM daily_checkin WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY checkin_date DESC LIMIT 365 ) t WHERE checkin_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT * FROM daily_checkin WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY checkin_date DESC LIMIT 365) AS temp) - 1 DAY)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM daily_checkin WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND checkin_date = #{checkinDate}
